subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Tribulations are manifest from every direction, and calamities abound beyond reckoning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بلایا از هر جهت مشهود و رزایا بسیار و خارج از احصاء اخیار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @oneness; unity of religion, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
